dataset.note: Primary benchmark uses held-out-family prediction over wave1_3_persona_json because the public wave-4 target block does not include economic-preference items.

main.label: Main benchmark
main.description: Use the full Twin profile plus all non-target economic families. Exclude the target family entirely.

intermediate.label: Intermediate ablation
intermediate.description: Use the full Twin profile plus only non-social economic families (mental accounting, time preference, risk preference).

strict.label: Strict ablation
strict.description: Use the full Twin profile with no economic-preference items at all.
